name: dispatch-guard
description: PreToolUse hook that validates Agent/Task dispatch calls: enforces model presence, rejects invalid model names (valid: haiku/sonnet/opus), applies split floor policy (hard-floor: atlas/sentinel/orchestrator must be opus; soft-floor: cipher/scout/oracle allow sonnet with advisory, block haiku). Append-only log at ~/.claude/dispatch-guard.log. Fail-open — never bricks a session.
